codemap.description: Semantic code search (hybrid vector + BM25), symbol lookup, file summaries, dependency graph analysis (PageRank, cycles, coupling). Use search_code for concept-based queries, search_symbols to find functions/types by name.

memory.description: Persistent agent memory across sessions. Search past decisions, patterns, and learnings. Save new memories, browse timeline, get session context, and manage retention.

tools.description: MCP gateway proxy — aggregates tools from third-party MCP servers (databases, APIs, services) enabled for this project. Tool names are prefixed with the server name (e.g. postgres__query, stripe__list_customers).
